response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume reflects a senior/lead profile inconsistent with an entry-level role, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and team integration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in DevOps and testing
Proven ability to work in agile environments with CI/CD and TDD practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but fluency is a hard requirement
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, not entry-level
No demonstrated Java project work despite Java being a core requirement
